info.title: LegionIO REST API
info.description: Async job engine and digital worker platform REST API. All routes are under the /api/ prefix. Success responses wrap data in { data: ..., meta: { timestamp, node } }. Error responses use { error: { code, message }, meta: { timestamp, node } }.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: SSE event stream and recent event buffer

get.description: Returns ok status and version. Skips auth middleware.
Returns readiness status for all components. Returns 503 if not ready. Skips auth middleware.
Returns a paginated list of tasks ordered by id descending. Optionally filtered by status or function_id.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Dispatches a task via Legion::Ingress. Requires runner_class and function. Additional keys in the request body are forwarded as the task payload. Returns 422 if runner_class or function are missing or invalid.

get.description: Returns a single task by id. Includes metering data (LLM token usage) when metering records exist for this task.

delete.description: Deletes a task record by id.

get.description: Returns all log entries for a task, ordered by id descending. Returns 404 if the task does not exist.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of log entries to skip

get.description: Returns all registered extensions ordered by id. Optionally filter to only active extensions via the active query parameter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Returns a single extension by id.
Returns all runners belonging to the given extension, ordered by id. Returns 404 if the extension does not exist.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Returns a single runner by runner_id within the given extension. Returns 404 if either the extension or the runner does not exist.
Returns all functions belonging to the given runner, ordered by id. Returns 404 if the extension or runner does not exist.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Returns a single function by function_id within the given extension and runner. Returns 404 if the extension, runner, or function does not exist.

404.description: Extension, runner, or function not found

post.description: Dispatches a task via Legion::Ingress using the runner namespace and function name resolved from the database. The request body is forwarded as the task payload. Returns 422 if the runner class is invalid.

404.description: Extension, runner, or function not found

get.description: Returns all registered nodes ordered by id. Optionally filter by active status or node status string.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Returns a single node by id.

BearerAuth.description: Legion-issued JWT token (worker or human scope)

TaskMetering.description: Aggregated LLM token usage for this task. Present only when metering records exist.

check_subtask.description: Whether to check for an existing subtask before creating a new one

generate_task.description: Whether to persist a task record for this invocation

TaskCreatedObject.description: Task creation result returned by Ingress.

TaskCreatedResponse.description: Response from POST /api/tasks — task_id and status from Ingress

by.description: Identity performing the transition (MSID or service name)

authority_verified.description: Confirm that the caller has verified authority for this transition

FunctionInvokeInput.description: Payload forwarded to the runner function. All extra keys are passed through as the task payload. check_subtask and generate_task control Ingress behavior.

task_ttl.description: Time-to-live for generated tasks, in seconds

payload.description: Arbitrary JSON payload forwarded to the runner on each execution.

transformation.description: Optional lex-transformer definition name to apply before execution

function_id.description: ID of the function to invoke on each tick

cron.description: Cron expression. Required when interval is not provided.

interval.description: Interval in seconds. Required when cron is not provided.

task_ttl.description: Time-to-live for generated tasks, in seconds

payload.description: Payload forwarded to the runner on each execution. Serialized to JSON when stored.

transformation.description: lex-transformer definition name to apply before execution

ScheduleUpdateInput.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated. Must include at least one of cron or interval if changing the trigger.
